name: python3-dfwinreg
title: python3-dfwinreg
summary: Digital Forensics Windows Registry library for Python 3
description:
Digital Forensics Windows Registry library for Python 3
dfWinReg, or Digital Forensics Windows Registry, provides read-only
access to Windows Registry objects. The goal of dfWinReg is to
provide a generic interface for accessing Windows Registry objects
that resembles the Registry key hierarchy as seen on a live Windows
system.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-dfwinreg because Digital Forensics Windows Registry library for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-dfwinreg as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-dfwinreg with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-dfwinreg --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
